key_improvements.title: Sound Interval Arithmetic and Explicit Verification Levels
key_improvements.description: Replace Python float-based interval arithmetic with mpmath arbitrary-precision intervals. Add explicit soundness levels (SOUND, BOUNDED, APPROXIMATE) to every verification result. Fix dReal delta-satisfiability semantics by propagating delta through CEGAR. Document Craig interpolation limitations and add LRA fallback linearization.
critiques_addressed: Python interval arithmetic lacks rounding mode control (Joseph Chang)
dReal delta-satisfiability semantics create soundness gap (Lila Zhang)
Craig interpolation for NRA not generally supported (Lila Zhang)
GP surrogate errors not propagated through formal guarantees (Yuan Cheng)
expected_changes: Rewrite solver/interval.py to use mpmath.iv for rigorous interval arithmetic
Add SoundnessLevel enum propagated through all verification results
Fix dreal_interface.py to track and propagate delta parameter
Add linearization fallback for Craig interpolation in smt/interpolation.py
Add surrogate error propagation in ai/robustness_surrogate.py
Update proof_certificate.py to record soundness level and assumptions

key_improvements.title: Scalability to 10+ Species via Compositional Verification
key_improvements.description: Extend benchmarks to 10-20 species circuits. Formalize circular assume-guarantee with explicit well-formedness conditions. Add automatic decomposition heuristics. Demonstrate on real SBML models from BioModels database. Add wrapping-effect mitigation via QR preconditioning.
critiques_addressed: Compositional verification soundness not formalized (Joseph Chang)
Interval over-approximation wrapping effects not addressed (Aniruddha Sinha)
Contract synthesis for nonlinear continuous presented as solved (consensus)
expected_changes: Add 10-20 species benchmark circuits to evaluation/benchmark_suite.py
Formalize circular AG proof rule in compositional/circular_ag.py
Add QR preconditioning to solver/ode_integrator.py for wrapping mitigation
Add SBML benchmark loading from BioModels
Run scalability experiments and collect timing data

key_improvements.title: Rigorous ML Evaluation with Quality-Gated Integration
key_improvements.description: Wire AI components into CEGAR loop with quality monitoring. Add cross-validation, held-out evaluation, and auto-disable when prediction quality degrades. Track precision/recall of predicate predictions. Run ablation experiments with real data.
critiques_addressed: ML training methodology critically underspecified (Sara Roy)
No cross-validation or held-out evaluation (Sara Roy)
No mechanism to detect and compensate for poor predictions (Sara Roy)
AI-guided predicate selection and CEGAR convergence not formally analyzed (Aniruddha Sinha)
expected_changes: Add quality monitoring to ai/predicate_predictor.py with auto-disable
Add cross-validation and evaluation metrics to ai/training_pipeline.py
Wire predicate predictor into cegar/refinement.py with fallback
Add ablation experiment tracking to evaluation/
Generate training data from actual verification runs

execution_order: Phase B1a: Fix soundness foundation (interval arithmetic, dReal, soundness levels)
Phase B1b: Scale compositional verification to 10+ species
Phase B1c: Wire and evaluate ML components
Phase B1d: Run comprehensive experiments and collect results
Phase B2: Math rigor pass (verify theorems, fix proofs)
Finalization: Rewrite paper, README, API.md, grounding.json
